content: Fix broken build: remove duplicate methods, add utf8_expected_len, fix print()
Implement correct flush_utf8() with replacement char on invalid UTF-8
Implement correct put_printable_char() with wide char handling + attribute merge
Fix print() to flush on new leading byte + handle orphan continuation bytes
Write corrected term/mod.rs with all fixes
Add 6-8 tests: Chinese, emoji, mixed, truncated, chunked, invalid, wide char wrap
Run cargo test to verify all tests pass
